name: Documentation error
about: Report a typo, inaccuracy, broken link, or other error in the documentation

---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Location

Provide the page URL or path to the affected file:

- Page: 
- Section/heading: 

## What is wrong

Describe the error (e.g. typo, incorrect information, broken link, missing content).

## What it should say

If applicable, provide the correct text or describe what the content should be.

## Additional context

Add screenshots or any other relevant context if helpful.
